title: Korak 14

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: You should log the message "The Math.max() and Math.min() methods are used to get the maximum and minimum number from a range." to the console.

description:
Za poslednji deo radionice, pregledaćete kako da dobijete minimalne i maksimalne vrednosti skupa brojeva.

Start by adding a console.log() that logs the message "The Math.max() and Math.min() methods are used to get the maximum and minimum number from a range." to the console.
